import_runs_completion_ck.name: import_runs_completion_ck
import_runs_completion_ck.value: ("import_runs"."status" = 'started' and "import_runs"."completed_at" is null) or ("import_runs"."status" = 'completed' and "import_runs"."completed_at" is not null)

import_runs_counts_ck.name: import_runs_counts_ck
import_runs_counts_ck.value: "import_runs"."source_byte_size" > 0 and "import_runs"."source_row_count" >= 0 and "import_runs"."accepted_count" >= 0 and "import_runs"."quarantined_count" >= 0 and "import_runs"."excluded_count" >= 0 and "import_runs"."aggregated_count" >= 0 and "import_runs"."suppressed_group_count" >= 0

sessions_revocation_ck.name: sessions_revocation_ck
sessions_revocation_ck.value: ("sessions"."revoked_at" is null and "sessions"."revocation_reason" is null) or ("sessions"."revoked_at" is not null and "sessions"."revocation_reason" is not null)

element_versions_dates_ck.name: element_versions_dates_ck
element_versions_dates_ck.value: "element_versions"."effective_to" is null or "element_versions"."effective_from" is null or "element_versions"."effective_to" > "element_versions"."effective_from"

element_versions_reviewer_ck.name: element_versions_reviewer_ck
element_versions_reviewer_ck.value: ("element_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is null and "element_versions"."reviewed_at" is null) or ("element_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "element_versions"."reviewed_at" is not null and "element_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" <> "element_versions"."authored_by_user_id")

element_versions_publication_ck.name: element_versions_publication_ck
element_versions_publication_ck.value: "element_versions"."status" not in ('published', 'retired') or ("element_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "element_versions"."reviewed_at" is not null and "element_versions"."published_at" is not null and "element_versions"."effective_from" is not null)

legacy_curriculum_mappings_review_ck.name: legacy_curriculum_mappings_review_ck
legacy_curriculum_mappings_review_ck.value: ("legacy_curriculum_mappings"."status" = 'proposed' and "legacy_curriculum_mappings"."reviewed_at" is null and "legacy_curriculum_mappings"."reviewed_by_user_id" is null) or ("legacy_curriculum_mappings"."status" <> 'proposed' and "legacy_curriculum_mappings"."reviewed_at" is not null and "legacy_curriculum_mappings"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null)

phase_versions_dates_ck.name: phase_versions_dates_ck
phase_versions_dates_ck.value: "phase_versions"."effective_to" is null or "phase_versions"."effective_from" is null or "phase_versions"."effective_to" > "phase_versions"."effective_from"

phase_versions_reviewer_ck.name: phase_versions_reviewer_ck
phase_versions_reviewer_ck.value: ("phase_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is null and "phase_versions"."reviewed_at" is null) or ("phase_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "phase_versions"."reviewed_at" is not null and "phase_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" <> "phase_versions"."authored_by_user_id")

phase_versions_publication_ck.name: phase_versions_publication_ck
phase_versions_publication_ck.value: "phase_versions"."status" not in ('published', 'retired') or ("phase_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "phase_versions"."reviewed_at" is not null and "phase_versions"."published_at" is not null and "phase_versions"."effective_from" is not null)

subtask_versions_dates_ck.name: subtask_versions_dates_ck
subtask_versions_dates_ck.value: "subtask_versions"."effective_to" is null or "subtask_versions"."effective_from" is null or "subtask_versions"."effective_to" > "subtask_versions"."effective_from"

subtask_versions_reviewer_ck.name: subtask_versions_reviewer_ck
subtask_versions_reviewer_ck.value: ("subtask_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is null and "subtask_versions"."reviewed_at" is null) or ("subtask_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "subtask_versions"."reviewed_at" is not null and "subtask_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" <> "subtask_versions"."authored_by_user_id")

subtask_versions_publication_ck.name: subtask_versions_publication_ck
subtask_versions_publication_ck.value: "subtask_versions"."status" not in ('published', 'retired') or ("subtask_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "subtask_versions"."reviewed_at" is not null and "subtask_versions"."published_at" is not null and "subtask_versions"."effective_from" is not null)

task_versions_dates_ck.name: task_versions_dates_ck
task_versions_dates_ck.value: "task_versions"."effective_to" is null or "task_versions"."effective_from" is null or "task_versions"."effective_to" > "task_versions"."effective_from"

task_versions_reviewer_ck.name: task_versions_reviewer_ck
task_versions_reviewer_ck.value: ("task_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is null and "task_versions"."reviewed_at" is null) or ("task_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "task_versions"."reviewed_at" is not null and "task_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" <> "task_versions"."authored_by_user_id")

task_versions_publication_ck.name: task_versions_publication_ck
task_versions_publication_ck.value: "task_versions"."status" not in ('published', 'retired') or ("task_versions"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "task_versions"."reviewed_at" is not null and "task_versions"."published_at" is not null and "task_versions"."effective_from" is not null)

question_versions_dates_ck.name: question_versions_dates_ck
question_versions_dates_ck.value: "question_versions"."effective_to" is null or "question_versions"."effective_from" is null or "question_versions"."effective_to" > "question_versions"."effective_from"

test_template_versions_dates_ck.name: test_template_versions_dates_ck
test_template_versions_dates_ck.value: "test_template_versions"."effective_to" is null or "test_template_versions"."effective_from" is null or "test_template_versions"."effective_to" > "test_template_versions"."effective_from"

attempt_correction_events_counts_ck.name: attempt_correction_events_counts_ck
attempt_correction_events_counts_ck.value: "attempt_correction_events"."previous_denominator" > 0 and "attempt_correction_events"."corrected_denominator" >= 0 and "attempt_correction_events"."previous_correct_count" between 0 and "attempt_correction_events"."previous_denominator" and "attempt_correction_events"."corrected_correct_count" between 0 and "attempt_correction_events"."corrected_denominator"

exam_attempts_original_score_ck.name: exam_attempts_original_score_ck
exam_attempts_original_score_ck.value: "exam_attempts"."original_denominator" is null or ("exam_attempts"."original_denominator" > 0 and "exam_attempts"."original_correct_count" between 0 and "exam_attempts"."original_denominator" and "exam_attempts"."original_score_percent" between 0 and 100)

exam_attempts_corrected_score_ck.name: exam_attempts_corrected_score_ck
exam_attempts_corrected_score_ck.value: "exam_attempts"."corrected_denominator" is null or ("exam_attempts"."corrected_denominator" > 0 and "exam_attempts"."corrected_correct_count" between 0 and "exam_attempts"."corrected_denominator" and "exam_attempts"."corrected_score_percent" between 0 and 100)

exam_instances_publication_ck.name: exam_instances_publication_ck
exam_instances_publication_ck.value: ("exam_instances"."status" = 'draft') or ("exam_instances"."published_at" is not null and "exam_instances"."start_closes_at" is not null and "exam_instances"."access_code_hash" is not null)

remediation_sessions_terminal_ck.name: remediation_sessions_terminal_ck
remediation_sessions_terminal_ck.value: ("remediation_sessions"."status" = 'open' and "remediation_sessions"."completed_at" is null and "remediation_sessions"."waived_at" is null) or ("remediation_sessions"."status" = 'completed' and "remediation_sessions"."completed_at" is not null and "remediation_sessions"."waived_at" is null) or ("remediation_sessions"."status" = 'waived' and "remediation_sessions"."waived_at" is not null and "remediation_sessions"."waived_by_user_id" is not null and "remediation_sessions"."waiver_reason" is not null)

retention_holds_release_ck.name: retention_holds_release_ck
retention_holds_release_ck.value: ("retention_holds"."released_at" is null and "retention_holds"."released_by_user_id" is null) or ("retention_holds"."released_at" is not null and "retention_holds"."released_by_user_id" is not null)

historical_assessment_aggregates_values_.name: historical_assessment_aggregates_values_ck
historical_assessment_aggregates_values_.value: "historical_assessment_aggregates"."calendar_year" between 1900 and 9999 and "historical_assessment_aggregates"."group_size" > 0 and "historical_assessment_aggregates"."attempt_count" >= 0 and ("historical_assessment_aggregates"."average_score" is null or "historical_assessment_aggregates"."average_score" between 0 and 100)

historical_generation_aggregates_values_.name: historical_generation_aggregates_values_ck
historical_generation_aggregates_values_.value: "historical_generation_aggregates"."calendar_year" between 1900 and 9999 and "historical_generation_aggregates"."group_size" > 0 and "historical_generation_aggregates"."generated_count" >= 0 and ("historical_generation_aggregates"."configured_length" is null or "historical_generation_aggregates"."configured_length" > 0)

historical_question_performance_values_c.name: historical_question_performance_values_ck
historical_question_performance_values_c.value: ("historical_question_performance"."calendar_year" is null or "historical_question_performance"."calendar_year" between 1900 and 9999) and "historical_question_performance"."asked_count" > 0 and "historical_question_performance"."correct_count" between 0 and "historical_question_performance"."asked_count"

quarantine_records_review_ck.name: quarantine_records_review_ck
quarantine_records_review_ck.value: ("quarantine_records"."reviewed_at" is null and "quarantine_records"."reviewed_by_user_id" is null) or ("quarantine_records"."reviewed_at" is not null and "quarantine_records"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null)

quarantine_records_snapshot_payload_ck.name: quarantine_records_snapshot_payload_ck
quarantine_records_snapshot_payload_ck.value: "quarantine_records"."reason_code" <> 'restricted_snapshot_only_content' or ("quarantine_records"."source_table" = 'usedQuestions' and "quarantine_records"."source_id" is null and "quarantine_records"."restricted_payload_json" is not null)
